titleStmt.title: SII 20.62: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 62. (B.K. No. 59 of 1935-36.) SAUNDATTI, PARASAGAD TALUK, BELGAUM DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab set up in the Basti-guḍi.

summary.p: The record is dated Vīra-Vikrama, i.e., Chāḷukya-Vikrama year 21, Dhātu, Pushya ba. 13, Sunday, Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkrānti. The details given are irregular. The tithi corresponds to January 14, Wednesday, A.D. 1097. But in the next year, i.e. A.D. 1098, the tithi corresponds to January 3, when the weekday was Sunday. In neither case did the said Saṁkrānti occur. The latter date, viz., A.D. 1098, January 3 might be the intended date.

The inscription records a gift, by the king, of land in Kāreyabāgu village to the temple of Jinēndra built by Kāḷasēna of the Raṭṭa family. It further records another gift of land by the Raṭṭa chief Sēna II to the same temple. It also refers to a gift of land made by the Raṭṭa chief Kannakaira II to his guru Kanakaprabhasiddhāntadēva. Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Kārtavīrya is mentioned as the feudatory of the king.
Published in JBBRAS, Vol. X, pp. 195-98.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrī pṛthvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvaraparamabhaṭṭārakaṁ . satyāśraya
kuḷatiḷakaṁ . cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ . śrīttribhuvanamalladēvavijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhipravarddhamā
namācandrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire . tatpādapadmōpajīvi . svasti samadhigatapañcamahāśabdamahā
maṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ . lattalūrppuravarādhīśvaraṁ trivaḷitūryyanirgghōṣaṇaṁ . raṭṭakuḷabhūṣaṇaṁ . sendhūralāñchanaṁ .
vivēkavirincanaṁ . suvarṇnagaruḍadhvajaṁ . sahajamakaradhvajaṁ nāmādi samastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahā
maṇḍaḷēśvaraḥ kārttavīryyanṛpaḥ . raṭṭavaṁśōdbhavaḥ khyātō nannabhūpasunandanaḥ . śrīmadāhavamallasya . pādapadmō
pasēvakaḥ . sahaśrabāhurivakhyātaḥ . kārttavīryyaḥpratāpavān . kuhuṇḍidēśayāghāṭaṁ
sādhitaṁ tēna bhūbhujā . rāja nvatyaḥ prajā jātā . ḍāvarināma bhūbhujā . tasyānujaḥ pratāpī syāt . kaThe letter(ja) is engraved below the line.
nnakairō mahīpatiḥ . tasyāgranandanō bhāti . vādyavidyāvidō bhuvi . Eṟagākhyamahīpasyā . danujō
syāṅkabhūpatiḥ . vādyavidyādharasyāgra (.) sūnuḥ śrīsēnabhūpati (.) stasyāgramahiṣī jātā .
maiḻalādēvirūrjjitā . śrī kāḷasēnabhūpasya . tasyāsīdagranandanaḥ . kannakaira nṛpaḥ khyātō . nṛtyagī
tādi kōvidaḥ . tasya guravaḥ . traividyō rājatē bhūmau . sarvvaśāstraviśāradaḥ . kanakaprabhasiddhānta
dēvō gaṇadharōpamaḥ . kanakaprabhadēvēbhyaḥ saṁkrāntau sattithau tadā . nivarttanaṁ dvādaśaṁ dattaṁ . namaśyaṁ kanna
bhūbhujā . tasyānujaḥ . gaṁbhīrēṇa samudrōsi . gauravēṇāsi mandaraḥ śrīkārttavīryya lōkānāṁ
kaḷpavṛkṣōsi dānataḥ . tasyāgranandanaḥ . vṛtta . śrīrāgatā maḷayaśōvanitā suyātā . tatra sthitā jaya
vadhūriva maṇḍaḷāgra . dhārāpathē subhaṭamaṇḍaḷikāgragaṇya . śrī sēnabhūpa kathamaskhaḷanēna citraṁ .
© ślōka . sugandhavartyāhvakē grāmē . dharmmajñajanatāvṛtē . śrī kāḷasēnabhūpēna kāritaṁ jinamandiraṁ . nivartta
naṁ dvādaśaṁ tasmaijinagēhāya bhaktitaḥ . bṛhaddaṇḍēna saṁdattaṁ . namaśyaṁ sēnabhūbhujā . ©
vacanaṁ . vīravikramakāḷanāmathēyasaṁvatsaraikaviṁśatipramītēṣvatitēṣu . varttamāna dhātusaṁ
vatsarē puṣya bahuḷa trayōdaśyāmādivārōttarāyaṇasaṁkrāntau . śrī vīrapermmāḍidēvēna kā
reyabāgu nāmadhēyasya sīvaṭē dvādaśanivarttanaṁ sarvvanamaśyaṁ dattaṁ . tasminnēva sīvaṭē . śrī kanna
kairēṇa svaguravē dvādaśanivarttanaṁ namaśyaṁ dattaṁ . tasya sīmā . pūrvvasyāṁ disi .
halasayyasīvaṭādārabhya puligeṟevaḷḷigrāmasya sīmā . dakṣiṇadigbhāgē . su
gandhavarttigrāmasya sīmā . paścimadigniḷayē kokkuṁbāḷugrāmasya sīmā . Uttarasyāṁ
disi maḷahārinadī sīmā . sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasēturnṛpāṇāṁ . kāḷē kāḷē pāḷa
nīyō bhavadbhiḥ . sarvvānētānbhāginaḥ pārtthivēṁdrān . bhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāma
bhadraḥ . bahubhirvvasudhā bhuktā rājabhissagarādibhiryyasya yasya yadā bhūmi (.) sta
sya tasya tadā phaḷaṁ . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā . yō harēti vasuṁdharāṁ . ṣaṣṭirvvarṣa saha
śrāṇi . viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē kṛmiḥ . vṛtta . Idanānandadinōdi pāḷisidavaṁgakkuṁ śubhaṁ
maṅgaḷaṁ . mudamutsāhamaśēṣasaukhyamesevāyuṁ śrīyumantalladintidu tānēke ga
ndapūṇḍu kiḍisalkeṁdirppa kaṣṭaṁrnnigōdadoḷarkkēndugaḷuḷḷinaṁ viṣamaduḥkhāvāsa maṁ poḻdugu .
nda . gaṁgāsāgarayamunāsaṁgamadoḷu vāraṇāsi gayeyeṁbī tīrtthaṁgaḷoḷā
kuladvijapuṁgavagōkulamanaḷidarintidanaḷidar . © vīrapermmāḍidēvasya jinā layaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 20.62 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
